description_long: This object is a vintage electronic device with a rectangular metal housing, featuring a dark, possibly painted exterior and a lighter front panel. The front panel is equipped with a central circular speaker grille, two rotary knobs, and two toggle switches, suggesting it is an audio or communication device. The top surface has a label with printed information, and the sides have ventilation slits for heat dissipation. The back appears to be a solid panel with no visible connectors or ports. The overall construction is robust, with visible screws securing the front panel and a utilitarian design typical of mid-20th-century electronics.
description: A vintage, box-shaped electronic device with a metal body, front speaker grille, control knobs, and ventilation slits.
description_view_0: The rear view shows a plain, dark metal panel with no visible controls or connectors.
description_view_1: The left side view displays three horizontal ventilation slits and a small label near the bottom.
description_view_2: The front view features a light-colored panel with a central speaker grille, two knobs, two toggle switches, and a brand logo.
description_view_3: The right side view mirrors the left, with three ventilation slits but no visible label.
attribute_control_interface: physical buttons, rotary dial, toggle switch
